name: paperwik
description: Paperwik marketplace - a single-plugin marketplace that publishes the Paperwik agent-maintained Obsidian knowledge base plugin.

plugins.name: pw
plugins.description: Agent-maintained Obsidian knowledge base. The LLM reads your sources, writes summary pages, maintains cross-references, and builds a persistent wiki that compounds over time. Non-technical Windows users never touch a terminal command beyond 'ingest this' or 'what do I know about X'.
